query: SELECT t.id, t.transactionNumber, t.commissionRate, t.commissionType, c.firstName, c.lastName FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN contacts c ON t.contactId = c.id WHERE c.lastName = 'Wilson' LIMIT 5;
